TESS Objects of Interest

Source: data/TOIs.csv — 8,064 objects, all TFOPWG dispositions · 1,026 in muscat-db (★ markers, click a point to open its target page) · 223 with Boyle2026 rotation data (RUWE, Prot, binarity flags) · 237 with HARPS RVBank data · 1,461 confirmed in NASA PSCompPars .

CSV (filtered)
Planet type OR: USP Hot Jupiter Jupiter-size Neptune-size Sub-Neptune Super-Earth Earth-size
Host star OR: M dwarf K type G type F type A / hotter
Candidate type OR / AND: PC CP KP APC FP FA Unset not NASA confirmed
Multiplicity OR: Single 2-planet 3-planet 4-planet 5+ planet
Rotation AND: Fast rotator (Prot < 10 d)

Observability AND / OR: depth > 1ppt Tmag ≤ 12 Dec > 0 Dec < 0

RV data AND: has HARPS RV
